mapper.select:
SELECT p.* FROM parts p
AND p.part_type = #{partType}
AND p.current_stock = 0
AND p.current_stock > 0 AND p.current_stock <= p.order_point
AND p.current_stock > p.order_point
AND (p.part_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.part_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.part_code IN ( SELECT per.part_code FROM part_equipment_relations per WHERE per.equipment_type = #{equipmentType} )
ORDER BY p.part_code
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parts p
AND p.part_type = #{partType}
AND p.current_stock = 0
AND p.current_stock > 0 AND p.current_stock <= p.order_point
AND p.current_stock > p.order_point
AND (p.part_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.part_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.part_code IN ( SELECT per.part_code FROM part_equipment_relations per WHERE per.equipment_type = #{equipmentType} )
SELECT * FROM parts ORDER BY part_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parts (part_code, part_name, part_type, unit, order_point, safety_stock, current_stock, unit_price, supplier, note) VALUES (#{partCode}, #{partName}, #{partType}, #{unit}, #{orderPoint}, #{safetyStock}, 0, #{unitPrice}, #{supplier}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE parts SET part_name = #{partName}, part_type = #{partType}, unit = #{unit}, order_point = #{orderPoint}, safety_stock = #{safetyStock}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, supplier = #{supplier}, note = #{note}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE part_code = #{partCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO part_equipment_relations (part_code, equipment_type, equipment_code) VALUES (#{partCode}, #{equipmentType}, #{equipmentCode})

INSERT INTO part_usages (part_code, equipment_code, usage_date, quantity, stock_before, stock_after, purpose, used_by, order_no) VALUES (#{partCode}, #{equipmentCode}, #{usageDate}, #{quantity}, #{stockBefore}, #{stockAfter}, #{purpose}, #{usedBy}, #{orderNo})
mapper.select: SELECT u.*, p.part_name, e.equipment_name FROM part_usages u LEFT JOIN parts p ON u.part_code = p.part_code LEFT JOIN equipment e ON u.equipment_code = e.equipment_code WHERE u.usage_id = #{usageId}
